---
title: "01 CRAM to FASTQ"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Convert input CRAM files to FASTQ files and prepare the CRAM sample list.

# Inputs

- CRAM storage root: `/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/sorghum_WGS_JS`
- CRAM list output: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq/piscbt_crams.list`

# Outputs

- FASTQ files under `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq/<sample>/`
- Slurm logs under `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq/logs/`

# Scripts

- `scripts/01_cram_to_fastq/01_prepare_cram_list_and_submit.sh`
- `scripts/01_cram_to_fastq/02_cram_to_fastq_array.sh`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
bash scripts/01_cram_to_fastq/01_prepare_cram_list_and_submit.sh
```

Set `CRAM_REF_FASTA` if the CRAM files require a different reference FASTA for
decoding.
